texto: I hope you know that you are not alone, and in those hours when you feel that you are, just know there are other people out there — singing the same melodies of wanderlust, climbing over mountains in the dark, and waking in the night to stare at the moon, thinking of this large world and dreaming — just like you
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Apex: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “I hope you know that you are not alone, and in those hours when you feel that you are, just know …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, alone, climbing-mountains pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
